case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC VS. CRAIG STOUGHTON et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT STOUGHTON, CRAIG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-25-2009
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395 (B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $255.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT STOUGHTON, CRAIG
DECLARATION OF STEVEN S. LOEB RE: CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF DIRECT TESTIMONY [CCP 595] FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
